description_long: This is a single-story bungalow set within a rectangular fenced yard, featuring a pitched roof and a light-colored exterior. The property includes a detached garage on one side and a small outbuilding or shed at the rear, both accessible via a driveway and pathways. The front of the bungalow has a prominent entryway with steps leading up to a covered porch, and the yard is landscaped with grass, a few trees, and some outdoor furniture. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern on the main facade, with additional windows on the sides and rear for ample natural light. The fence is picket-style, enclosing the entire property and providing privacy. The overall style is reminiscent of a classic suburban or ranch bungalow, suitable for a residential neighborhood.
description: A single-story bungalow with a pitched roof, covered porch, detached garage, and fenced yard, featuring symmetrical windows and landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and steps, with the garage visible to the right and a tree in the rear yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, the driveway leading to the garage, and the fenced yard with a shed and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, shed, and outdoor furniture, with the back facade of the bungalow and garage visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side of the bungalow, the garage, and the full extent of the fenced property.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side and rear windows
